necessityProof.blockerResolved: The disabled adapter client precheck and upstream echo verification reports still hand-wrote the full Markdown report frame even though their title/meta/Checks/Summary/messages/Evidence Endpoints/Next Actions sections matched the shared builder contract.
necessityProof.laterConsumer: N1 final acceptance can now classify these disabled adapter client reports as builder-backed before scanning other early managed-audit reports.
necessityProof.reuseDecision: The shared builder owns the repeated report frame. Env-handle, failure-taxonomy, and upstream-echo rows remain local because they carry version-specific explanation text and do not yet repeat across enough remaining files to justify a shared helper.
necessityProof.growthStopCondition: No new spacing option or extra generic helper was added. Reconsider only if multiple remaining reports share the same compact or local-line grammar and pass byte-identical comparison.

byteIdenticalCompare.method: Temporary Vitest loaded each legacy renderer through git show HEAD:<path>, transpiled it in-memory with TypeScript, and compared ready plus blocked profile output against the migrated renderer.

archiveDeliverables.codeWalkthrough: 代码讲解记录_生产雏形阶段3/r2000/2107-renderer-consolidation-batch-19-v2136.md

crossProjectParallel.reason: v2136 changes only Node Markdown renderer internals and archive documentation. It does not change evidence schemas, routes, contracts, fresh sibling evidence requirements, or live integration startup behavior.
